items.reason: New design spec in the PR accurately describes the added `dscli logs -w <host:port> [-n N]` command, default line count, local read-only scope, registration, and test coverage.
New implementation plan in the PR matches the changed files by covering `cli/logs.py`, command registration, the focused unit test, and verification command.
This user-facing dscli command reference documents existing subcommands and log collection, but the PR does not add the new `dscli logs` usage or its `--worker_address`/`--lines` options.
